title: シンザン記念にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the Shinzan Kinen has finally arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The lineup is full of formidable opponents, but
Taiki Shuttle doesn't shrink back one bit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to become Umamusume of the Year, she
sets off toward the racecourse with power in her
step!
